title: galium fruticescens var. aciphyllum
intro: Galium fruticescens var. aciphyllum, also known as Wood Betony or Woodland Betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Galium fruticescens var. aciphyllum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
